ogTitle: Neerim vs Neerim East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Neerim and Neerim East.
heading: Neerim vs Neerim East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Neerim, Victoria and Neerim East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Neerim East has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Neerim (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Neerim or Neerim East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Neerim has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Neerim East scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Neerim scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Neerim East scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Neerim or Neerim East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Neerim East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
